role_title: Manager, Strategy & Operations - Core Consumer Experience

level_signals: Title is 'Manager' but reports to Senior Manager, implying IC-like manager without explicit direct reports mentioned
Comp range $136K–$200K base, consistent with Manager-level IC at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 6+ years of working experience in strategy, operations, consulting, growth, product, marketplace, or general management roles
You're creative – You love thinking about new problems, and can switch between high level strategic thinking and in-the-weeds execution as needed
You're a go-getter – You have a bias towards action, are comfortable with ambiguity, and are able to thrive in a fast-paced, constantly changing work environment

You're analytical – You enjoy getting deep into data and feel comfortable translating what you're seeing into tangible insights, you are extremely comfortable operating at the lowest level of detail - advanced analytics, experimentation, dashboards
You have a proven track record of owning and scaling growth initiatives in complex environments
You have exceptional cross-functional leadership skills, with the ability to influence without authority

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have past start up experience
You're AI-fluent and familiar with prompt engineering and model evaluation

scope.surface: DoorDash in-app consumer experience — food discovery, restaurant/dish discovery, content creation, go-to-market campaigns
core_responsibilities: Shape team strategy and decide 'what we should do next'
Design and launch new initiatives from the ground up
Analyze experiment results to inform business decisions and future experiments
Partner with Product, Engineering, Design, Marketing, Analytics for cross-functional and go-to-market execution
Help users discover the best restaurants and dishes
Use AI to automate existing processes
Create and implement efficient processes for working cross-functionally with strategic partners

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($136K–$200K base) and competitive
Equity grants included in compensation package
Comprehensive benefits including 16 weeks paid parental leave, wellness, 401(k) matching
Clear team mission and product surface described
Role has direct influence on major consumer product decisions at a large-scale platform
red_flags: Work location type is unclear — JD body does not specify remote, hybrid, or onsite; pay is stated as localized by work location, suggesting location matters
Manages people is ambiguous — title is 'Manager' but no direct reports are mentioned; role reports to Senior Manager
Broad comp range ($136K–$200K) may indicate significant location-based variance with little transparency

fields_inferred_not_stated: location.type (not explicitly stated; inferred as 'unclear' because no remote/hybrid/onsite designation given in body)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred as true from national pay range covering Illinois and Colorado, and lack of city requirement)
seniority.level (inferred from comp range and title; people management not stated)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
manages_people (not stated; inferred as false given no mention of direct reports)

Role title is 'Manager' but the JD does not mention managing direct reports; could be a senior IC manager title rather than a people manager.
